verses.1: The LORD says to my Lord, “Sit at my right hand,
verses.2: The LORD will send out the rod of your strength out of Zion.
verses.3: Your people offer themselves willingly in the day of your power, in holy array.
verses.4: The LORD has sworn, and will not change his mind:
verses.5: The Lord is at your right hand.
verses.6: He will judge among the nations.
verses.7: He will drink of the brook on the way;
